latest.title: UI/UX Stability Update
latest.summary: Fixes backspace in Set Store URL (root cause), double header render, and debug overlay position. Adds catalog scrolling with scroll bar, URL validity indicator, header version gap, and styled empty-catalog card.
notes: Fix: Backspace now works in Set Store URL — _is_text_entry_state() and _dispatch() both now handle store_url_entry correctly.
Fix: Set Store URL screen no longer renders two overlapping section headers.
Fix: DEV/RAM/FPS overlay moved to bottom-left, away from the clock and back-hint.
Improved: Long URLs are clipped in the input box so the tail is always visible.
Improved: URL validity dot (green/amber/dim) shown to the right of the input.
Improved: 10px gap between section header title and version label.
Added: Game catalog list now scrolls when there are more entries than fit on screen.
Added: DPAD navigation auto-scrolls the viewport; wrap-around snaps correctly.
Added: Thin scroll bar indicator on the right edge of the catalog list.
Added: Empty-catalog state shows a styled rounded card with star icon.

channels.name: public-preview
channels.description: Fast-moving public preview channel for early OkamaOS users and creators.

channels.name: stable
